# @zakkster/lite-headless / result

Page-state primitive: success / error / warning / info / empty / 404 /
403 / 500. The bigger sibling of `empty-state` — typically occupies
the main content area to communicate an outcome with a centered icon,
title, subtitle, and action row.

## When to use result vs empty-state

| | result | empty-state |
|---|---|---|
| Scope | page-level | container-level |
| Typical use | "404 not found", "Submission successful" | "No tasks yet", "Empty inbox" |
| Status vocabulary | rich (8 statuses) | none (just empty) |

## Quick example

```js
import { createResult } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/result";

const r = createResult({ status: "404" });
r.attachRoot(rootEl);
r.attachIcon(iconEl);
r.attachTitle(titleEl);
r.attachSubtitle(subtitleEl);
r.attachActions(actionsEl);
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | `"info"` | One of: `success`, `error`, `warning`, `info`, `empty`, `404`, `403`, `500` |

## API

```ts
{
    status: string    // readonly

    attachRoot(el): off
    attachIcon(el): off
    attachTitle(el): off
    attachSubtitle(el): off
    attachActions(el): off

    destroy(): void
}
```

## Painted attributes

### Root (`[data-result-root]`)

- `role="status"` (only if not pre-set; live-region for SR)
- `data-status="<status>"`

### Icon (`[data-result-icon]`)

- `aria-hidden="true"` (decoration; title carries the meaning)

### Title (`[data-result-title]`)

- `data-result-title` slot marker

### Subtitle (`[data-result-subtitle]`)

- `data-result-subtitle` slot marker

### Actions (`[data-result-actions]`)

- `role="group"` (only if not pre-set)

## Wrapper (`<lite-result>`)

```html
<lite-result status="404">
    <div data-result-icon>📭</div>
    <h2 data-result-title>Page not found</h2>
    <p data-result-subtitle>The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.</p>
    <div data-result-actions>
        <button>Go home</button>
        <button>Contact support</button>
    </div>
</lite-result>
```

## CSS contract

```css
[data-result-root] {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 60px 24px;
    gap: 12px;
}
[data-result-icon] { font-size: 64px; opacity: 0.6; }
[data-result-title] { font-size: 22px; margin: 0; }
[data-result-subtitle] { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.7; margin: 0 0 8px; }
[data-result-actions] { display: flex; gap: 8px; }

[data-result-root][data-status="error"] [data-result-icon] { color: var(--red); }
[data-result-root][data-status="success"] [data-result-icon] { color: var(--green); }
[data-result-root][data-status="404"] [data-result-icon] { color: var(--accent); }
/* ...etc per status ... */
```
